evals.prompt: Turn docs/PRD.md into an implementation plan in PLAN.md.
evals.expected_output: A detailed, ordered implementation plan derived from the source document with scope, dependencies, validation, and acceptance criteria.
assertions: Reads the source document before planning.
Breaks work into ordered, implementable steps.
Requires CHANGELOG.md creation before implementation starts.
Requires CHANGELOG.md decisions before each step commit but entries only for functional changes.
Requires CHANGELOG.md to follow Keep a Changelog 1.0.0.
